Traditional methods often compress historical data, which can overlook important behavioral patterns and lead to cognitive biases in predictions. PraMem shifts this perspective by treating historical sequences as valuable resources, allowing for better utilization in predicting future actions. Experimental results show that PraMem outperforms existing methods, providing deeper insights into how experiential memory evolves and contributes to improved accuracy in predictions.

zh.title: 将历史序列转化为经验记忆，提升行为预测准确性
zh.desc: 本文提出了一种新的方法PraMem，用于改善长时间行为预测的准确性。通过将冗长的历史序列转化为经验记忆，PraMem能够更有效地利用历史数据。与传统的上下文压缩方法不同，PraMem将历史序列视为一种宝贵资源，从而提升了模型的预测能力。实验结果表明，PraMem在多种任务中表现优于以往的方法，并提供了对经验记忆机制的深入分析。

papers.title: GORGO: Online Tuning for Cross-Region Network-Aware LLM Serving
papers.abstract: Abstract GORGO is a proxy architecture that optimizes LLM inference load balancing by jointly considering network latency, prefill cost, and queueing delay through evolutionary strategy tuning on a new synthetic dataset.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Increasingly, LLM inference services proxy client requests to engine replicas distributed globally. Load-balancing policies must jointly account for factors including KV-cache locality, replica load, and variable network latency when optimizing for metrics like latency and TTFT. However, existing systems only evaluate a subset of these factors in their cost model, leading to uneven concentrations of load and KV-cache across replicas. We present GORGO, a proxy architecture that holistically factors network latency, prefill cost, and queueing delay using tunable parameters. Since open-source chat datasets such as LMSYS-Chat1M and WildChat-4.8M lack long-context, high prefix-reuse data, we release a synthetic dataset, ART-Chat-2.5M, from long-context production metadata. On a tuning window from ART-Chat-2.5M, evolutionary strategies guide the GORGO policy's parameters to directly optimize p95 TTFT. During held-out evaluation windows, we fix the parameter values learned from tuning and improve p95 TTFT by 6.9-15.5% and p95 end-to-end (E2E) latency by 14.3-30.9% over baseline load-balancing policies such as simple session affinity and prefix-cache. The code and ART-Chat-2.5M dataset can be found at https://github.com/Arcadia-Research-Team/GORGO.

ru.title: Умная балансировка нагрузки через эволюционные стратегии
ru.desc: GORGO — это архитектура прокси-сервера для оптимизации балансировки нагрузки при инференсе больших языковых моделей, которая одновременно учитывает сетевую задержку, стоимость prefill-этапа и очередь запросов. Авторы предлагают использовать эволюционные стратегии для настройки параметров политики балансировки на новом синтетическом датасете ART-Chat-2.5M, созданном из реальных данных с длинным контекстом. Система достигает улучшения метрики p95 TTFT на 6.9-15.5% и общей задержки на 14.3-30.9% по сравнению с базовыми методами балансировки. Публикуется открытый датасет и исходный код системы для применения в распределённых сервисах инференса.

en.title: Optimizing LLM Inference with GORGO: A Holistic Approach to Load Balancing
en.desc: GORGO is a new proxy architecture designed to improve the efficiency of large language model (LLM) inference by optimizing load balancing. It takes into account multiple factors such as network latency, prefill costs, and queueing delays, using evolutionary strategies to fine-tune its parameters. By addressing the limitations of existing systems that only consider a few factors, GORGO achieves better distribution of load and cache usage across replicas. The results show significant improvements in metrics like p95 TTFT and end-to-end latency compared to traditional load-balancing methods.

zh.title: GORGO：优化LLM推理的负载均衡新策略
zh.desc: GORGO是一种代理架构，旨在通过共同考虑网络延迟、预填充成本和排队延迟来优化大规模语言模型（LLM）推理的负载均衡。该架构使用进化策略调优在一个新的合成数据集上进行训练，以提高系统的性能。现有的负载均衡策略往往只考虑部分因素，导致负载和KV缓存的不均匀分布。通过引入GORGO，研究人员能够在保持参数固定的情况下，显著提高95百分位的总推理时间（TTFT）和端到端延迟。

papers.title: Deform360: A Massive Multi-view Visuotactile Dataset for Deformable World Models
papers.abstract: Abstract A large-scale visuotactile dataset called Deform360 is introduced to study deformable object dynamics, enabling comparison between 2D video and 3D particle world models for robotic manipulation tasks.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Predicting object dynamics (i.e., world modeling) is a fundamental challenge for robotic manipulation, and modeling deformable objects presents a particularly difficult case due to their high-dimensional state spaces and complex material properties. While current world models approach this through two distinct paradigms: learning the dynamics over the 2D pixel space or more explicit 3D geometric space. A systematic understanding of their relative strengths and limitations remains elusive due to the lack of diverse, large-scale real-world data. To address this, we present Deform360, a large-scale visuotactile dataset featuring 198 daily-life objects, 1,980 interaction sequences, and over 215 hours of observations from 41 surround-view cameras and bimanual tactile grippers to capture both global motion and contact-induced local deformations. Leveraging a novel markerless visuotactile 3D tracking pipeline to extract dense geometry and motion, we systematically evaluate current state-of-the-art world models, comparing 2D video models against 3D particle models. Finally, we provide a preliminary demonstration indicating the real-world applicability of our dataset by performing robot planning tasks on deformable objects. Our analysis reveals key insights into the trade-offs between structural priors and scalability, providing a solid benchmark for future research in generalizable deformable object-centric world modeling. Project website: https://deform360.lhy.xyz

ru.title: Сравнение 2D и 3D world models для манипуляции деформируемыми объектами
ru.desc: В работе представлен набор данных Deform360 для изучения динамики деформируемых объектов, содержащий наблюдения от 41 камеры и тактильных датчиков с 198 объектами в 1980 последовательностях взаимодействий. Авторы сравнивают два подхода к моделированию мира: предсказание динамики в 2D пиксельном пространстве и в явном 3D геометрическом пространстве с использованием частичных моделей. Разработана новая система маркерлесс отслеживания для извлечения плотной геометрии и движения объектов. Исследование выявляет компромиссы между структурными предположениями и масштабируемостью, предоставляя эталонный набор данных для развития обобщённых world models деформируемых объектов.

en.title: Deform360: Advancing Robotic Manipulation with Visuotactile Insights
en.desc: The paper introduces Deform360, a large-scale visuotactile dataset designed to enhance the understanding of deformable object dynamics in robotic manipulation. It captures extensive data from 198 everyday objects through 1,980 interaction sequences, utilizing 41 cameras and bimanual tactile grippers to observe both global movements and local deformations. The study compares the effectiveness of 2D video models and 3D particle models in predicting object dynamics, addressing the challenges posed by high-dimensional state spaces. By providing a comprehensive benchmark, the dataset aims to facilitate future research in developing more effective world models for handling deformable objects in real-world scenarios.

zh.title: 探索可变形物体动态的新视角
zh.desc: 本文介绍了一个名为Deform360的大规模视觉触觉数据集，旨在研究可变形物体的动态特性。该数据集包含198种日常物品、1980个交互序列，以及来自41个全景摄像头和双手触觉抓取器的215小时观察数据。通过比较2D视频模型和3D粒子模型，本文系统评估了当前最先进的世界模型，并揭示了结构先验与可扩展性之间的权衡。最终，我们展示了该数据集在可变形物体机器人规划任务中的实际应用潜力。

papers.title: CONFLUX: A Latent Diusion Model for 3D Chest-CT Synthesis with RL Post-Training
papers.abstract: Abstract A 3D latent diffusion model for chest CT generation that achieves high-fidelity results while enabling control over clinical attributes through metadata conditioning and reinforcement learning refinement.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Controllable generative models of 3D medical images can synthesize volumes with specified clinical attributes, but this demands samples that are simultaneously high-fidelity, natively 3D, and faithful to the requested conditioning. We present CONFLUX, a latent diffusion model for chest computed tomography (CT): a 3D variational autoencoder compresses each volume, and a rectified-flow transformer generates in the latent space. Generation is conditioned on structured radiological metadata (18 abnormality findings, sex, age, and reconstruction kernel) through adaptive layer normalization. The model leads strong volumetric baselines on tri-planar Frechet distance (FID 32.3 vs. 74.6 for MAISI) while exposing direct control over clinical attributes. To strengthen that control we add an online reinforcement-learning post-training stage (group-relative policy optimization) that rewards how reliably a classifier recovers the requested findings from each generated volume. Judged by a separate, independent classifier, post-training removes 47% of the shortfall relative to real-scan reliability. We release the model and a ~200k synthetic chest-CT dataset with conditioning metadata spanning a wide variety of clinical findings.
affiliations: Department of Biomedical Data Science, Stanford University School of Medicine
Department of Electrical Engineering, Stanford University
Department of Mathematical Modelling, Statistics & Bioinformatics, Ghent University

ru.title: Управляемая генерация реалистичных 3D снимков грудной клетки с заданными клиническими признаками
ru.desc: Авторы представляют CONFLUX — модель скрытой диффузии для генерации трёхмерных компьютерных томограмм грудной клетки. Модель использует вариационный автокодировщик для сжатия объёмов и трансформер на основе спрямлённых потоков для генерации в скрытом пространстве. Кондиционирование осуществляется через метаданные радиологических исследований (аномалии, пол, возраст, параметры реконструкции) с помощью адаптивной нормализации слоёв. Для улучшения контроля над клиническими атрибутами применяется этап постобучения с подкреплением (оптимизация политики на основе относительных групповых вознаграждений), который повышает надёжность восстановления запрашиваемых находок в сгенерированных томограммах на 47%.

en.title: CONFLUX: High-Fidelity 3D Chest CT Generation with Clinical Control
en.desc: The paper introduces CONFLUX, a 3D latent diffusion model designed for generating high-quality chest CT images. It utilizes a variational autoencoder to compress 3D volumes and a transformer to generate images in the latent space, allowing for control over clinical attributes through metadata conditioning. The model achieves impressive results, significantly improving the fidelity of generated images while ensuring they align with specified clinical conditions. Additionally, an online reinforcement learning stage enhances the model's ability to produce reliable outputs that meet clinical expectations.

zh.title: 高保真胸部CT生成与临床属性控制的创新模型
zh.desc: 本文介绍了一种用于胸部CT生成的3D潜在扩散模型CONFLUX。该模型能够生成高保真度的医学图像，并通过元数据调节实现对临床属性的控制。使用3D变分自编码器压缩每个体积，并通过修正流变换器在潜在空间中生成图像。通过在线强化学习后训练阶段，模型显著提高了生成图像的临床属性可靠性。

papers.title: AI Wizards at EXIST 2026: Hierarchical Soft-Label Learning for Multimodal Sexism Identification in Memes
papers.abstract: Abstract A multimodal sexism identification system for memes uses hierarchical conditional soft-label prediction with vision-language embeddings and a lightweight Gated MLP trained via KL divergence and uncertainty weighting.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct We present the AI Wizards submission to EXIST 2026 for multimodal sexism identification in memes. The task is composed of three, increasingly harder subtasks. We model them hierarchically as conditional soft-label prediction over empirical annotator distributions. Our system maps fixed Gemini Embedding 2 vision-language representations through a lightweight Gated MLP trained with KL divergence and homoscedastic uncertainty weighting. Our submissions ranked first on Task 2.3 and fourth on Tasks 2.1 and 2.2 on the official Soft-Soft leaderboards. The code is available at https://github.com/NLP-AI-Wizards/EXIST-2026
affiliations: Swiss Data Science Center, ETH Zürich

ru.title: Иерархическое предсказание мягких меток для детекции сексизма в мультимодальных данных
ru.desc: В работе предлагается система для выявления сексизма в мемах с использованием многомодальных данных. Авторы применяют иерархический подход с предсказанием мягких меток, условно зависящих от распределения разметок аннотаторов. Система использует предобученные vision-language эмбеддинги от Gemini Embedding 2 и тренирует лёгкую нейросеть Gated MLP с помощью дивергенции Кульбака-Лейблера и взвешивания по неопределённости. Метод показал конкурентные результаты на соревновании EXIST 2026, заняв первое место на одной из задач.

en.title: Identifying Sexism in Memes with Multimodal AI
en.desc: This paper presents a system designed to identify sexism in memes by analyzing both visual and textual elements. It employs a hierarchical approach using conditional soft-label prediction, which allows the model to learn from the distribution of human annotators' labels. The system utilizes vision-language embeddings from Gemini Embedding 2 and is powered by a lightweight Gated MLP that is trained using KL divergence and uncertainty weighting techniques. The results show strong performance, ranking first in one task and fourth in two others on the official leaderboards.

zh.title: 多模态迷因性别歧视识别的创新系统
zh.desc: 这篇论文介绍了一种多模态性别歧视识别系统，专门用于分析网络迷因。该系统采用分层条件软标签预测，结合视觉-语言嵌入和轻量级的门控多层感知机（Gated MLP），通过KL散度和不确定性加权进行训练。我们将任务分为三个逐渐增加难度的子任务，并通过经验标注者分布进行建模。我们的系统在官方排行榜上，任务2.3获得第一名，任务2.1和2.2分别获得第四名。

papers.title: Speaker-Disentangled Chunk-Wise Regression for Syllabic Tokenization
papers.abstract: Abstract A speaker-disentangled syllabic tokenizer regresses perturbed student representations toward clean teacher targets to improve syllable boundary detection and speech language modeling performance.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Unsupervised syllabic tokenization aims to learn discrete syllabic tokens that capture latent linguistic content-related structure from raw speech. Recent syllabic tokenization methods employ teacher-student distillation of the pretrained HuBERT to organize latent speech frame representations into syllabic segments. However, when trained with an utterance-level cross-entropy objective, the model predicts speaker identity rather than linguistic content, thereby compromising the purity of syllabic tokens. To address this problem, we propose a speaker-disentangled syllabic tokenizer that regresses speaker-perturbed student representations toward clean teacher targets within fixed-length chunks. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance in syllable boundary detection and syllabic segment clustering. Moreover, a speech language model trained on our syllabic tokens achieves a 7% relative improvement in syntactic and semantic understanding over the phone-level SpiRit-LM.
affiliations: National Institute of Information and Communications Technology

ru.title: Разделение информации говорящего для чистой слоговой токенизации речи
ru.desc: В статье предложен метод обучения дискретных слоговых токенов из сырой речи с использованием дистилляции знаний между учителем и студентом. Основная проблема предыдущих подходов заключалась в том, что модель предсказывала характеристики говорящего вместо лингвистического содержания, что снижало качество токенизации. Авторы решают эту задачу путем регрессии возмущенных представлений студента к чистым целевым представлениям учителя с явным разделением информации о говорящем. Предложенный метод достигает лучших результатов в обнаружении границ слогов и показывает значительное улучшение производительности языковой модели речи.

en.title: Disentangling Speaker Identity for Better Syllabic Tokenization
en.desc: This paper introduces a new method for syllabic tokenization in speech processing, focusing on separating speaker identity from linguistic content. The proposed speaker-disentangled syllabic tokenizer uses a teacher-student model to refine student representations by aligning them with clean teacher targets, improving the accuracy of syllable boundary detection. By addressing the issue of speaker identity interference, the model enhances the quality of the generated syllabic tokens. Experimental results show that this approach not only excels in syllable boundary detection but also boosts the performance of a speech language model significantly.

zh.title: 解耦说话者的音节分词器提升语音理解
zh.desc: 本文提出了一种说话者解耦的音节分词器，通过将受干扰的学生表示回归到干净的教师目标，来提高音节边界检测和语音语言建模的性能。该方法旨在从原始语音中学习离散的音节标记，以捕捉潜在的语言内容结构。与传统的音节分词方法不同，我们的方法避免了模型预测说话者身份的问题，从而提高了音节标记的纯度。实验结果表明，我们的方法在音节边界检测和音节段聚类方面达到了最先进的性能。

papers.title: PixCon: Clean-Positive Contrastive Learning for Foundation-Model Semi-Supervised Segmentation
papers.abstract: Abstract PixCon is a semi-supervised semantic segmentation framework that uses clean-positive pixel-contrastive learning with per-class memory banks to improve accuracy over existing methods.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Semi-supervised semantic segmentation (SSSS) has long turned on one question, which pseudo-labels to trust, and answered it with ever more careful confidence filtering. Foundation backbones change the regime: with a DINOv2 teacher a strict threshold already retains a measured 98%-clean pseudo-label set, so the accuracy that remains lives not in the filter but in how the embedding space is structured by class. We propose PixCon, a clean-positive pixel-contrastive framework. PixCon maintains a per-class memory bank that admits only labeled pixels the student already classifies correctly, guaranteeing a contamination-free positive set (ρ_F=0) by construction, unlike prior contrastive SSSS banks (ReCo, U^2PL) built from confidence-filtered pseudo-labels. It is a single branch over a consistency backbone, adds no inference-time parameters, and needs no bank-specific threshold. A first-order analysis of the supervised-InfoNCE gradient explains why contamination hurts: its false-positive term scales as ρ_F/(1-ρ_F), which we measure (0.018 on Pascal, 0.106 on ADE20K) rather than assume. Across Pascal VOC, Cityscapes, and ADE20K, PixCon matches or improves a strong DINOv2-based UniMatch V2 baseline in a compute-matched one-switch protocol: it improves every Pascal-1/8 seed (a per-seed gain of about +0.2 mIoU) and its three-seed mean reaches 87.90, the published UniMatch V2-B figure. Because contamination is already rare under foundation-model teachers, our analysis indicates the ρ_F=0 guarantee acts chiefly as robustness as teachers weaken, while the accuracy gain comes from cleaner positive supervision, making clean-positive contrast a robust, low-cost default for foundation-model SSSS.

ru.title: Чистые примеры вместо фильтрации: контрастивное обучение без загрязнения для сегментации
ru.desc: PixCon представляет полусообщаемый фреймворк семантической сегментации, который использует контрастивное обучение на чистых положительных пиксельных примерах с банками памяти для каждого класса. В отличие от предыдущих методов, PixCon гарантирует отсутствие загрязнения в положительном наборе, сохраняя только те пиксели, которые студент-модель уже правильно классифицирует. Авторы анализируют, почему загрязнение псевдо-меток вредит обучению, и показывают, что влияние ложных позитивных примеров масштабируется с контролируемым коэффициентом. Метод демонстрирует улучшение или совпадение с сильной базовой линией DINOv2 на стандартных бенчмарках Pascal VOC, Cityscapes и ADE20K без добавления параметров на этапе инференса.

en.title: Clean-Positive Contrast for Robust Semantic Segmentation
en.desc: PixCon is a new framework for semi-supervised semantic segmentation that enhances accuracy by using clean-positive pixel-contrastive learning. It introduces per-class memory banks that only include correctly classified labeled pixels, ensuring a contamination-free positive set. This approach eliminates the need for complex confidence filtering and additional parameters during inference. The results show that PixCon outperforms existing methods, providing a more robust and efficient solution for semantic segmentation tasks.

zh.title: 干净正样本对比学习的语义分割新方法
zh.desc: PixCon是一种半监督语义分割框架，采用干净正样本的像素对比学习，结合每类的记忆库，以提高准确性。该方法通过使用DINOv2教师模型，确保生成的伪标签集的准确性，避免了以往方法中伪标签的污染问题。PixCon的设计保证了每个类的记忆库只包含学生已经正确分类的标记像素，从而构建了一个无污染的正样本集。通过在多个数据集上的实验，PixCon在计算资源相匹配的情况下，达到了或超过了现有强基线的性能。
